title: Leaf's Copper Backport
description: Brings the new copper tools and armor set to older versions of Minecraft!
body:
# ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2a896fab1a2ae6ea128221efd962b06bf33b29.png)

[![Modrinth Link](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg&;n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-backport)
[![CurseForge Link](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg&;n=-1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-backport)

This mod brings the addition of the copper armor and toolset introduced in a later version of Minecraft to popular versions of the game for modding. 

_Take a look at the copper toolset, armor set, and yes, **even nuggets**!_
# ![Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90b5a3b87d621eb734c5c59a679a80f29d16a33d.png)

**_All assets within this mod are owned by Mojang and do not belong to me._**
